problem_text_cn:
3-19 在水平冰面上兄弟俩作推车游戏，哥哥质量$m_{1}$，弟弟质量$m_{2}$，小车质量$m$。开始时哥哥与小车静止在同一地点，弟弟静止在另一地点。而后，哥哥将小车朝着弟弟推去，小车推出后相对于哥哥的速度大小为$u$。弟弟接到小车后又将小车推向哥哥，小车推出后相对于弟弟的速度大小仍为$u$。哥哥接到小车后又再次将小车推向弟弟，如此继续下去。设冰面光滑，且足够大。
(1) 若某次弟弟推出的小车恰好追不上哥哥，试求三者各自的运动速度大小；
(2) 若无论$u$取什么样的非零值，弟弟第一次推出的小车都是恰好追不上哥哥，试给出$m_{1}$，$m_{2}$，$m$之间需满足的关系式。
problem_text_en:
3-19 On a smooth, horizontal ice surface, two brothers play a pushing‑cart game. The elder brother has mass $m_{1}$, the younger brother mass $m_{2}$, and the cart mass $m$. Initially, the elder brother and the cart are stationary at the same spot, and the younger brother is stationary at another spot. Then the elder brother pushes the cart towards the younger brother; after being pushed, the cart’s speed relative to the elder brother is $u$. After the younger brother catches the cart, he pushes it back towards the elder brother; after being pushed, the cart’s speed relative to the younger brother is again $u$. After the elder brother catches the cart, he pushes it towards the younger brother once more, and so on. The ice is smooth and sufficiently large.
(1) If at a certain time the cart pushed by the younger brother can just not catch up with the elder brother, find the speed of each of the three.
(2) If, no matter what non‑zero value $u$ takes, the cart pushed by the younger brother for the first time can just not catch up with the elder brother, give the relation that $m_{1}$, $m_{2}$, and $m$ must satisfy.
problem_solution_en:
Solution (1) The final state is shown in Figure 3-23. The velocities of $m$ and $m_{1}$ must be the same, hence
$$ (m_{1}+m)v_{1}=m_{2}v_{2},\quad v_{1}+v_{2}=u, $$
solving gives $v_{1}=\dfrac{m_{2}}{m_{1}+m_{2}+m}u$, $v_{2}=\dfrac{m_{1}+m}{m_{1}+m_{2}+m}u$.

(2) After the elder brother pushes the cart for the first time, let his backward speed be $v_{1}'$ and the cart’s forward speed be $u'$. From the equations
$$ m_{1}v_{1}'=mu',\quad v_{1}'+u'=u, $$
we obtain $v_{1}'=\dfrac{m}{m_{1}+m}u$, $u'=\dfrac{m_{1}}{m_{1}+m}u$.

After the younger brother catches the cart the first time, his acquired speed is
$$ v_{20}=\frac{m}{m_{2}+m}u'=\frac{m_{1}m}{(m_{2}+m)(m_{1}+m)}u. $$

After the younger brother pushes the cart out again, let his speed be $v_{2}'$ and the cart’s speed be $u''$. From the equations
$$ (m_{2}+m)v_{20}=m_{2}v_{2}'-mu'',\quad u''+v_{2}'=u, $$
we obtain
$$ v_{2}'=\frac{m(2m_{1}+m)}{(m_{2}+m)(m_{1}+m)}u,\quad u''=\frac{m_{2}m_{1}-mm_{1}+mm_{2}}{(m_{2}+m)(m_{1}+m)}u. $$

To make the elder brother’s velocity the same as in part (1), we require $v_{1}'=v_{1}$, i.e.
$$ \frac{m}{m_{1}+m}u=\frac{m_{2}}{m_{1}+m_{2}+m}u, $$
hence $m$, $m_{1}$, $m_{2}$ must satisfy the relation
$$ m_{1}m_{2}=m(m_{1}+m). $$
Using this relation, $u''$ can be rewritten as
$$ u''=\frac{m(m_{2}+m)}{(m_{2}+m)}\frac{m_{1}m_{2}}{m}u=\frac{m^{2}}{m_{1}m_{2}}u=\frac{m^{2}}{m(m_{1}+m)}u, $$
which yields
$$ u''=v_{1}'=v_{2}, $$
so the cart just cannot catch up with the elder brother.
img_cn: 图片为“3-19 在水平冰面上兄弟俩作推车游戏”的题目文本，包含题干、两小问及解答过程。解答中有数学公式，如$v_1=\frac{m_2}{m_1+m_2+m}u$，$v_2=\frac{m_1+m}{m_1+m_2+m}u$等。右侧是“图3-23”示意终态速度关系。

图片为“3-19 在水平冰面上兄弟俩作推车游戏”的题目文本，包含题干、两小问及解答过程。解答中有数学公式，如$v_1=\frac{m_2}{m_1+m_2+m}u$，$v_2=\frac{m_1+m}{m_1+m_2+m}u$等。右侧是“图3-23”示意终态速度关系。

 该图也包含了解题步骤，详细展示了动量守恒、能量守恒方程的应用，以及推导$v_1'$、$u'$、$v_{20}$、$v_2'$、$u''$的过程，并最终给出质量关系$m_1m_2=m(m_1+m)$。

The solution contains mathematical formulas, such as $v_1=\frac{m_2}{m_1+m_2+m}u$, $v_2=\frac{m_1+m}{m_1+m_2+m}u$, etc. On the right side is "Figure 3-23" illustrating the velocity relationship in the final state.

The solution contains mathematical formulas, such as $v_1=\frac{m_2}{m_1+m_2+m}u$, $v_2=\frac{m_1+m}{m_1+m_2+m}u$, etc. On the right side is "Figure 3-23" illustrating the velocity relationship in the final state.

The image also includes the solution steps, detailing the application of momentum conservation and energy‑conservation equations, the derivation of $v_1'$, $u'$, $v_{20}$, $v_2'$, $u''$, and finally gives the mass relation $m_1m_2=m(m_1+m)$.
